description: Alice asks to cancel whatever is on her calendar at 3 PM today, without naming the event specifically.

events.title: Team Sync
events.reasoning: Alice asks to cancel her 3 PM today. The calendar context shows a Team Sync at 3 PM today (2026-02-20). Matched by time reference. Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Identified event by time reference '3 PM today' matching the calendar context entry at 15:00.

mock_llm_response.summary: Cancelled the Team Sync at 3 PM today.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). 'My 3 PM today' matches calendar_context[0] at 15:00. Event identified by time alone, not by name. existing_event_id=1.
